omitted_declarations.policy_reference: User Content (e.g., photos and other materials) that you post through the Service. Communications between you and Skincare and Facecare. For example, we may send you Service-related emails (e.g., changes/updates to features of the Service, technical and security notices). Note that you may not opt out of Service-related e-mails.
